---
name: Feature request
about: Share an idea that would make YAMS better
title: "[feature]: "
labels: ''
assignees: trvon

---

Thanks for sharing an idea. Problem statements are especially helpful, even if the solution is still rough.

> Please write requests in your own words. AI-assisted editing is okay if you verify it, but don't submit generated discussion that does not reflect your actual intent.

## Problem
What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposal
What would you like to happen?

## Why this would help
Who benefits, and how?

## Alternatives considered
What other approaches did you consider?

## Scope
Anything clearly in or out of scope?

## Acceptance criteria
What would “done” look like?

## UX / CLI / API sketch
If relevant, include example commands, flags, config, or sample output.

## Compatibility / migration
Any concerns about defaults, upgrades, config changes, or breaking behavior?

## Extra context
- Priority: P1 High | P2 Medium | P3 Low
- Component: cli | daemon | search | vector | model | docs | ci | packaging
- Links, prior art, or related issues:
